$comment: Locked direct deps across the project. Spec-of-code for the active-maintenance gate per book/HARD-RULES.md. Audit script at sim/tools/dep-audit/audit.ts queries https://registry.npmjs.org/<name> + asserts latest publish within 6 months. Any failure triggers OSS-import-first re-scan + replacement. Exceptions documented in adr/active-maintenance-exceptions.md.
hand_rolled_no_oss_alternative: $comment: every entry here must have NO actively-maintained OSS alternative + must be in adr/oss-import-audit.md with rejection rationale. Per operator: never reinvent the wheel.
sim-engine state machine (pure (state, action) → state', ≤100 LOC, XState wrong shape)
MIPS executor with per-step datapath trace (no library returns per-cycle trace; existing libs return final state only)
object pool for Three.js Vector3/Quaternion/Matrix4 (≤30 LOC, no sized OSS pool)
bits utilities two's complement + sign-extend (≤60 LOC, no sized OSS)
base64url wrapper around btoa/atob (~10 LOC trivial)
QM + Petrick + hazard analysis on top of espresso-iisojs (no actively-maintained JS QM library)
